messages: This project is organized as a Rust-based service daemon with modular source crates, a separate UI component, Docker/container support, systemd service integration, and accompanying build, start, and configuration scripts for messaging platform adapters (Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark).
result_json.text: This project is organized as a Rust-based service daemon with modular source crates, a separate UI component, Docker/container support, systemd service integration, and accompanying build, start, and configuration scripts for messaging platform adapters (Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark).
